channel.title: STRATRONIX — Hrvatska | Private AI-Agent Appliance
channel.description: Hrvatska content from STRATRONIX — on-premise AI hardware appliances for EU regulated industries.

item.title: PAA Hrvatska 2026 — Private AI-Agent Appliance | STRATRONIX
item.description: STRATRONIX PAA Hrvatska: Private AI-Agent Appliance za Hrvatska. On-Premise AI hardver, GDPR + Zakon o provedbi Opće uredbe o zaštiti podataka, AI Act. Zagreb + Tourism, shipbuilding, food processing, pharmaceuticals.

item.title: On-Premise LLM Hrvatska 2026 — Lokalni LLM bez oblaka | STRATRONIX
item.description: On-Premise LLM Hrvatska 2026: Lokalni jezični modeli bez oblaka. STRATRONIX STA-100 za Hrvatska tvrtke. GDPR + Zakon o provedbi Opće uredbe o zaštiti podataka, AI Act.
